description: Defines a Java record class 'CreditBureauRequest' for a minimal, generic credit bureau lookup request. It includes fields for applicant and business identifiers, normalizes input strings, and provides methods to check for identifiers and generate a stable key.

classes.name: CreditBureauRequest
classes.description: A Request model for credit bureau lookup, designed to be minimal and provider-agnostic. Provides normalization and utility methods.

methods.name: normalize
methods.description: Trims input strings and converts empty strings to null for consistent handling.

methods.name: hasAnyIdentifier
methods.description: Checks if at least one of the applicant or business identifiers is present.

methods.name: stableKey
methods.description: Generates a non-sensitive, deterministic key string based on identifier fields for stub behaviors or logging.
